description: On master with in-flight workstream branches — STEP 0.0 fires HALT, names branches.
expected_result: HALT — master + in-flight workstream branches detected

expected_signal.halt_message_contains: On master with in-flight workstream branches

load_bearing_assertion: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD = master. git branch --list 'feature/*' 'bugfix/*' returns feature/my-feature + bugfix/fix-rate. Orchestrator emits HALT message with branch list. Does not proceed to STEP 0.1 or frontier-scan.
separates_from_defect_by: no-enforce-non-master defect skips STEP 0.0 — orchestrator proceeds past master state silently. Golden: HALT fires with branch names listed.
halt_message_template: On master with in-flight workstream branches: [feature/my-feature, bugfix/fix-rate]. Check out the target workstream branch and re-run.
